name: sqlbroker-marketplace
description: Plugins for managing local MSSQL access from Claude Code

plugins.name: sqlbroker
plugins.description: Alias-based MSSQL broker for Claude Code on Windows. Stores credentials in the OS keyring (Windows Credential Manager) by alias so the chat never sees passwords. Includes /sqlbroker:install, /sqlbroker:add, /sqlbroker:list, /sqlbroker:test, /sqlbroker:remove, /sqlbroker:status, plus the sqlbroker skill that auto-activates on any DB-query intent. v2 auto-migrates legacy DPAPI aliases to keyring.
